name: rtx
_comment: ABLATEST TEST (m-perf ablation): RTX prefill on mini (Q3_K), decode routes to P100 (Q5_K balanced) -- cross-quant KV transfer. HYDRA_COORD_ALLOW_CROSS_MODEL_KV_REUSE=true bypasses CrossModelGuard. **Output is expected to be garbage** -- this is a measurement run, not a production config. To revert: remove prefill_model_name and set HYDRA_COORD_ALLOW_CROSS_MODEL_KV_REUSE=false.

name: p100
_comment: P100 llama-server runs in single-model mode (--model /mnt/readonly_data/...gguf), not router mode — /models/load returns 404. Leave prefill_model_name / decode_model_name / router_model_name UNSET so CoordinatorConfig.LoadWorkers and Router.PrefillModel/DecodeModel return null and the model_load call is skipped (Router.PrefillModel is gated by `if (m != null)` in WorkerSchedulerService.ModelLoadAsync). The cross-model guard checks the P100's slot model_hash against the stored KV's model_hash on restore (since the P100 runs the same model as the RTX, the hashes match → Proceed). When a Coordinator restart loses the in-memory manifest, the model identity is read from the chunked manifest in the Store (PutManifestAsync writes it alongside n_past / total_size / chunks).
